rules.name: Functions should be moved to the highest possible scope
Exceptions should not be ignored
Negated conditions should be avoided when an else clause is present
Optional chaining should be preferred
Redundant casts and non-null assertions should be avoided
Multiple consecutive calls to methods that accept multiple arguments should be combined
Two branches in a conditional structure should not have exactly the same implementation
Unused assignments should be removed
Node.js built-in modules should be imported using the "node:" protocol
Cognitive Complexity of functions should not be too high
Number static methods and properties should be preferred over global equivalents
Variables should be used in the blocks where they are declared
Loop counters should not be assigned within the loop body
Imports from the same module should be merged
"structuredClone()" should be used instead of other deep cloning methods
Nullish coalescing should be preferred
String literals with escaped backslashes should use `String.raw` template literals
Track uses of "TODO" tags
Unnecessary imports should be removed
Comma operator should not be used
Import and export statements should not have empty specifier lists
Fields that are only assigned in the constructor should be "readonly"
Deprecated APIs should not be used
Literals should not be thrown
React props should be read-only
Functions should not have identical implementations
Node.js built-in modules should be imported using the "node:" protocol
Variables should be declared with "let" or "const"
Unnecessary character escapes should be removed
S3 operations should verify bucket ownership using ExpectedBucketOwner parameter
